changelog: 1.0 (2026-06-06): Initial backend-api container task subgraph (gold reference output).

overview: Task subgraph for the backend-api container: package scaffold, one implementation task per component, and the unit/integration/security test tasks that realize TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.

tasks.title: Scaffold the backend-api package
tasks.description: Fastify app skeleton, package manifest, Prisma client wiring and the test harness. (Built standalone before the system stitch, so this subgraph carries only same-file dependencies; the system repo-scaffold edge is added when /sdlc:task builds docs/TASKS.json.)
acceptance: the app boots and serves a health route

tasks.title: Implement the auth middleware
tasks.description: Validate bearer JWTs against the OIDC JWKS before routing; reject unauthenticated requests with 401.
acceptance: a request with a valid token is routed
a request with no/invalid token gets 401

tasks.title: Implement the tasks controller
tasks.description: Map the tasks endpoints to the task use-cases (create/read/update, mark done).
acceptance: creating a task returns 201 with a persisted id
marking a task done flips its status

tasks.title: Implement the comments controller
tasks.description: Map the comments endpoints to the comment use-cases.
acceptance: adding a comment persists it and returns it on the task

tasks.title: Implement the digest-settings controller
tasks.description: Read/update the weekly digest schedule and list recent runs newest-first.
acceptance: enabling the digest and setting a send time persists and reads back

tasks.title: Implement the persistence repository
tasks.description: Single Prisma-backed data-access layer for Task, Comment and DigestRun.
acceptance: Task, Comment and DigestRun rows can be written and read back

tasks.title: Unit tests: tasks controller
tasks.description: Realize the tasks-controller unit tests (create + mark-done).
acceptance: the tests realizing TST-001 and TST-002 pass

tasks.title: Integration tests: repository + postgres
tasks.description: Realize the repository round-trip (TST-005) and the postgres-outage failure case (TST-008) against a real test DB.
acceptance: a written Task reads back identically
a DB outage surfaces as a retried then graceful 503

tasks.title: Security tests: auth + PII redaction
tasks.description: Realize the forged-JWT rejection (TST-006) and the no-PII-in-logs check (TST-007).
acceptance: a forged/expired token yields 401 and never reaches a controller
no log line contains the raw email or comment body
